findings.issue: The checkpoint correctly blocks a serious structural error in the generated Step 1 output.
evidence: AAPL generation claims two operating segments: Products and Services
AAPL gate blocks on count mismatch from checkpoint A
findings.recommended_change: Preserve supporting filing excerpt and expected count in the gate artifact for easier debugging.

findings.issue: Repeated NOT_FOUND outputs are too opaque to diagnose whether the problem is content, synonym handling, or bad substitution.
evidence: step1_checkpoint_b.md contains only five repeated NOT_FOUND lines
findings.recommended_change: Include tested segment text and a brief failure reason or nearest filing match.

findings.issue: Snippet-verification outputs are parseable but not reviewer-friendly.
evidence: step1_checkpoint_c.md contains only repeated NOT_FOUND lines
findings.recommended_change: Include sampled claim IDs and a short reason when a snippet is not found.
